import json

cache = {}


def get_user_profile(user_id: str, filters: dict) -> dict:
    cache_key = json.dumps({"user_id": user_id, "filters": filters})
    if cache_key in cache:
        return cache[cache_key]
    profile = fetch_profile(user_id, filters)
    cache[cache_key] = profile
    return profile


def search_products(query: str, category: str, sort_by: str) -> list:
    cache_key = json.dumps({"q": query, "cat": category, "sort": sort_by})
    if cache_key in cache:
        return cache[cache_key]
    results = db.search(query, category, sort_by)
    cache[cache_key] = results
    return results
